$comment: Cross-repo lockstep pin (spec 031). Binds the acme-vue-encore generator + module catalog to the template-encore baseline structure and to the frozen app-invariant spec hashes (001 architecture, 002 security/data). The invariant-hash pin was deferred through Phase 1 and Phase 2 (001 absorbed the static-serving wiring from spec 010 in Phase 2, so pinning its hash earlier would have locked a value about to change) and is now ACTIVE: the Phase 3 handshake flipped invariantPin.status to 'pinned', filled the 001/002 spec.md SHA-256 content hashes, and bumped pinnedRef to the finalized template-encore main. Re-hash drift on either invariant now fails the gate (FR-002). A future ref or hash bump remains a deliberate, coupling-gated edit to spec 031.

invariantPin.reason: Phase 3 handshake (2026-06-23): 001/002 finalized in template-encore at b37d3d7. Each value is the SHA-256 of the invariant spec.md at the pinned ref (matching check.ts sha256File); a re-hash mismatch is reported as DRIFT and fails the gate.
